hero.name: Joel John
hero.title: Mobile Developer
hero.description: Building fintech solutions & payment systems with Flutter & iOS across 5 countries. Specializing in scalable architecture, system design, and mobile excellence.

projects.name: SoftPOS
projects.description: Mobile payment solution enabling tap-to-pay transactions. Built with Flutter, NFC integration, and Firebase backend for secure payment processing across 5 countries.

projects.name: LendHOPE
projects.description: Digital lending platform with KYC integration, credit scoring, and loan management. Built with clean architecture and real-time syncing.

projects.name: Pocket Mentor
projects.description: Educational app connecting mentors and mentees with real-time messaging and profile management.

experience.description: Leading mobile development for fintech payment solutions. Architected Flutter apps handling millions of transactions. Mentored 3+ engineers on system design and clean architecture.
Built iOS and Android apps from scratch. Implemented real-time syncing, offline-first architecture, and cross-platform features.
Started with iOS development, quickly picked up Flutter and became the go-to person for mobile solutions.
